scripts.dev:h5:v1: cross-env UPPER_VERSION=1 UPPER_FEATURES=common npm run dev:h5
scripts.dev:h5:v2: cross-env UPPER_VERSION=2 UPPER_FEATURES=common,temp npm run dev:h5
scripts.dev:h5:v3: cross-env UPPER_VERSION=3 UPPER_FEATURES=common,temp,voice npm run dev:h5
scripts.dev:h5:v5: cross-env UPPER_VERSION=5 UPPER_FEATURES=common,temp,remote,ble,app npm run dev:h5
scripts.build:h5:v1: cross-env UPPER_VERSION=1 UPPER_FEATURES=common npm run build:h5
scripts.build:h5:v2: cross-env UPPER_VERSION=2 UPPER_FEATURES=common,temp npm run build:h5
scripts.build:h5:v3: cross-env UPPER_VERSION=3 UPPER_FEATURES=common,temp,voice npm run build:h5
scripts.build:h5:v5: cross-env UPPER_VERSION=5 UPPER_FEATURES=common,temp,remote,ble,app npm run build:h5
scripts.sync:android:v4: npm run build:h5:v4 && npm run sync:android
scripts.sync:android:v5: npm run build:h5:v5 && npm run sync:android
scripts.sync:android:v6: npm run build:h5:v6 && npm run sync:android
scripts.sync:android:v7: npm run build:h5:v7 && npm run sync:android
scripts.open:android:v4: npm run sync:android:v4 && npm run open:android
scripts.open:android:v5: npm run sync:android:v5 && npm run open:android
scripts.open:android:v6: npm run sync:android:v6 && npm run open:android
scripts.open:android:v7: npm run sync:android:v7 && npm run open:android
